ksa_text: Knowledge of statistical foundations, including descriptive statistics, inferential statistics, probability theory, distributions, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, and the distinction between statistical significance and practical significance.

dcwf.top_element_label: * Knowledge of risk management processes (e.g., methods for assessing and mitigating risk).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

top_anchors.element_label: * Knowledge of risk management processes (e.g., methods for assessing and mitigating risk).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-K-001 (AB, Knowledge) maps to Bioinformatics Technician scope as strong fit. Composite score 0.4073 clears the strong fit threshold of 0.35. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.407, onet=0.407, nice=0.402. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4073 for strong fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AB-K-001 (AB, composite 0.4073) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with O*NET 15-2051.00 (Data Scientists), DCWF 411 (Data Analyst) and 421 profiles, DDAT Data Analyst role framework. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4073 with signal across ddat=0.407, onet=0.407, nice=0.402 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4073, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
